LanguageData.Ammo_FusionBomb.label: fusion warhead
LanguageData.Ammo_FusionBomb.description: Low-velocity shell designed to be fired from a mortar.
LanguageData.Ammo_LargeNuclearBomb.label: large nuclear warhead
LanguageData.Ammo_LargeNuclearBomb.description: Low-velocity shell designed to be fired from a mortar.
LanguageData.Ammo_SmallNuclearBomb.label: small nuclear warhead
LanguageData.Ammo_SmallNuclearBomb.description: Low-velocity shell designed to be fired from a mortar.
LanguageData.Ammo_DirtyNuclearBomb.label: dirty nuclear warhead
LanguageData.Ammo_DirtyNuclearBomb.description: Low-velocity shell designed to be fired from a mortar.
